response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure experience with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, aligning well with the technical requirements. However, the resume lacks explicit depth in production-grade AI/GenAI solutions, vector databases, or RAG architectures, and his leadership in customer-facing technical roles is not clearly highlighted.
strengths: Extensive experience (10+ years) in full-stack development with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud technologies, relevant to the role's technical stack.
Direct contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, showing familiarity with emerging GenAI tooling.
Proven ability to design and build scalable systems (e.g., GISCollective, Optilyz), demonstrating problem-solving and architectural skills.
concerns: Lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI/GenAI solutions, a core requirement for the role.
No clear mention of experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, which are critical for the position.
Leadership in customer-facing technical discovery sessions or stakeholder management is not prominently detailed.
